brains.name: Build Product Agent
brains.mission: Build complete digital product packs from PLR/SaaS source material.

subagents.name: Product Researcher
subagents.job: Find source angles, niches, buyer pains, and product opportunities.

subagents.name: Offer Architect
subagents.job: Create product promise, outline, modules, bonuses, and OTO structure.

subagents.name: Asset Packager
subagents.job: Turn outputs into clean deliverables, checklists, prompts, templates, and ZIP structure.

subagents.name: License/Risk Checker
subagents.job: Flag unclear rights, risky claims, and regulated-topic concerns.

subagents.name: Digital Product Curriculum Builder
subagents.job: Turn lesson libraries, challenges, and workflows into paid digital product training.

subagents.name: SaaS Tool Packager
subagents.job: Package SaaS, AI agents, apps, frontend/backend demos, and tool workflows into sellable offers.

brains.name: JV Manager Agent
brains.mission: Prepare WarriorPlus/JV launch assets, affiliate pages, swipes, commission angles, and partner outreach.

subagents.name: Affiliate Researcher
subagents.job: Extract affiliate angles, buyer avatars, and promotion hooks.

subagents.name: JV Page Writer
subagents.job: Create JV page copy, affiliate instructions, contest notes, and promo assets.

subagents.name: Swipe Writer
subagents.job: Write prelaunch, launch day, follow-up, and bonus-angle email swipes.

subagents.name: Launch Ops
subagents.job: Build launch checklist, delivery notes, refund terms, and approval workflow.

subagents.name: Traffic Channel Planner
subagents.job: Plan Facebook, Medium, Quora, SEO, LinkedIn, and free-traffic promotion systems.

subagents.name: Email/List Growth Operator
subagents.job: Build lead magnets, opt-in flows, buyer list nurture, and follow-up systems.

brains.name: Sale Page Agent
brains.mission: Create compliant direct-response sales pages from source offers, PLR, examples, screenshots, and transcripts.

subagents.name: Hook Miner
subagents.job: Find headlines, pain points, mechanisms, objections, and proof substitutes.

subagents.name: Copywriter
subagents.job: Draft sales page sections, bullets, CTAs, FAQ, and guarantee copy.

subagents.name: Compliance Editor
subagents.job: Remove fake scarcity, income guarantees, unsafe claims, and license assumptions.

subagents.name: Conversion Editor
subagents.job: Improve flow, clarity, offer stack, objection handling, and CTA strength.

brains.name: AI Printables Agent
brains.mission: Build AI-assisted PLR products, KDP covers, coloring books, journals, posters, social assets, Etsy/Canva printable bundles, and fast rebrandable product packs from Udemy transcript lessons.

subagents.name: Niche Miner
subagents.job: Find profitable printable/KDP/Etsy/Canva angles from course transcripts.

subagents.name: Product System Builder
subagents.job: Turn AI workflows into sellable PLR packs, journals, coloring books, worksheets, covers, and bundles.

subagents.name: Asset Prompt Builder
subagents.job: Create prompts, style systems, asset specs, and production workflows for image/text products.

subagents.name: Launch Packager
subagents.job: Package offers with FE, bump, OTO, license, delivery, and WarriorPlus/Gumroad/Etsy positioning.

brains.name: Case Study Brain Agent
brains.mission: Use old files as searchable case-study memory for PLR, SaaS, WarriorPlus, KDP, kids printables, sales pages, funnels, JV packs, and launch proof patterns.

subagents.name: Product Research Miner
subagents.job: Find market patterns, product angles, buyer pains, and useful product structures from old files.

subagents.name: Sales Page Pattern Miner
subagents.job: Extract sales page structures, hooks, offer stacks, objections, and proof substitutes.

subagents.name: Email Swipe Pattern Miner
subagents.job: Find email sequences, subject lines, launch swipes, and follow-up patterns.

subagents.name: WarriorPlus/JV Pattern Miner
subagents.job: Find JV page, affiliate, commission, review access, and launch operation patterns.

subagents.name: Funnel/OTO Pattern Miner
subagents.job: Find FE, bump, OTO, backend, downsell, and bundle structures.

subagents.name: KDP/Kids Printable Miner
subagents.job: Find KDP printable, kids worksheet, Canva, planner, and educational bundle patterns.

caseStudyBrain.training_mode: RAG / searchable case-study memory, not model-weight fine-tuning

aiPrintablesBrain.training_mode: RAG / searchable niche brain from Udemy transcripts, not model-weight fine-tuning

activeProject.promise: Turn raw PLR into a structured product kit with launch assets
